mcq.question: What is currency?
mcq.correct: Money used to buy and sell goods and services
wrong: A method used to store data securely
A type of computer hardware device
A system used to connect networks

mcq.question: What is another name for digital currency?
What determines the value of digital currency?
mcq.correct: What users believe it is worth
wrong: The number of computers in a network
The speed of the internet connection
The size of the storage device

mcq.question: What is a private key?
mcq.correct: A secret key used to authorise transactions
wrong: A public key shared with others
A password used to log in

mcq.question: Why must a private key be kept secure?
mcq.correct: It is needed to spend or transfer currency

mcq.question: What is a public key?
mcq.correct: A key shared so others can send currency
wrong: A key used to unlock encrypted files
A key stored only on servers

mcq.question: What does a digital wallet store?
What is a blockchain?
mcq.correct: A distributed digital ledger of transactions

mcq.question: How are transactions stored in a blockchain?
mcq.correct: In blocks with details and timestamps
wrong: In single files on one server

mcq.question: What is a distributed ledger?
mcq.correct: A ledger stored on many computers
wrong: A ledger stored on one server
A file stored on a hard drive

mcq.question: Why is fraud difficult in blockchain?
mcq.correct: All copies of the ledger must match
wrong: Data is stored on one computer
Only one user controls the system

mcq.question: Which is a benefit of digital currency?
Which is a drawback of digital currency?
mcq.correct: Private keys can be lost or hacked

mcq.question: What happens if a private key is lost?
